show_product_price.description: Determines the visibility of the product price.

show_product_sku.description: Determines the visibility of the product SKU.

show_product_weight.description: Determines the visibility of the productʼs weight.

show_product_brand.description: Determines the visibility of the productʼs brand.

show_product_shipping.description: Determines the visibility of the productʼs shipping option.

show_product_rating.description: Determines the visibility of the productʼs rating.

show_add_to_cart_link.description: Determines the visibility of the Add to Cart link.

default_preorder_message.description: The productʼs pre-order message. If undefined, the message defaults to the storewide setting.

show_add_to_cart_qty_box.description: Determines the visibility of the Add to Cart quantity setting.

show_add_to_wishlist.description: Determines the visibility of the Add to Wishlist setting.

hide_price_from_guests.description: Determines the visibility of the price.
